title: Forbidden Potions
description: Effects that weren't added as potions. Craft potions like "Darkness" or "Resistance" etc.
body:
![All potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4bD9ilIR/images/3445b6a987acdd01028df97bfeee63bf8ba395dd.png) ### Always wanted a potion of Darkness? Why not? ### Your friend is too annoying? Throw a potion of Nausea at them ### This mod allows you to brew effects that have no potions in vanilla minecraft ## What's planned for the future? + III and IV tiers of all potions + Custom items provided by the mod to brew some of the potions + Ability to extend time of II, III and IV tier potions (Imagine Darkness IV or Nausea IV that last 8 minutes xd)
Follow to stay tuned for the updates >< ## Full List of potions ### Can be crafted in survival To craft them, you need “thick potion”, not “awkward potion” as for vanilla potions
*** Some crafts may change in the future ***
POTION INGREDIENT
Darkness Echo shard
Nausea Beetroot
Blindness Spider Eye
Hunger Rotten Flesh
Withering Wither Rose
Glowing Glow Ink
Absorption Golden Apple
Haste Sugar
Resistance Scute
Health Boost Ghast Tear
Levitation Membrane
Dolphin's Grace Nautilus Shell
Conduit Power Conduit
Bad Luck Dead Bush
Luck Rabbit's Foot
Mining Fatigue Puffer Fish
### Creative only | You can't craft them
Bad Omen
Hero of the village
Saturation
### Also try my other mods
